{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}


# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is a Quarto book.

To learn more about Quarto books visit <https://quarto.org/docs/books>.

```{webr}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
nc <- st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package="sf"))
nc
ggplot() +
geom_sf(data = nc, aes(fill = BIR79))
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Mini Code Assignment

```{webr-r}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
nc <- st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package="sf"))
nc

#--- plot the "BIR79 attribute in a cloropleth map"  ---#
#--- write code below  ---#

```

### Solution
```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| code-fold: false

library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
nc <- st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package="sf"))
```
```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: Hint 1
ggplot() + 
```
```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: Hint2
geom_sf(data = nc, aes(fill = BIR79))
```

:::
